name: Chinese Butterfly Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
peeled, deveined and butterflied with tail intact.
1. Mix dry ingredients together; add milk to make a thin batter.
2. Dip each shrimp in the batter.
3. Deep fry at 375°F for 2 to 3 minutes, without crowding, until golden brown.
4. Serve with barbecue sauce.
- To prepare barbecue sauce: Heat soy sauce; add remaining ingredients and simmer for 5 minutes.
